title: Five takeaways from the first round of French local elections
subhed: The 2026 municipal elections have already concluded in the vast majority of French towns, with a mayor being directly elected in the first round. In larger cities, however, the right and the Socialists are in the lead for the second round.

title: Trump agitated and exasperated by continued blocking of strategic Strait of Hormuz
subhed: The US president criticized his European allies for their lack of enthusiasm after proposing an operation aimed at restoring freedom of navigation for oil tankers blocked in the Persian Gulf.

title: 'This is not our war': Europe refuses to be dragged into Trump's war with Iran
subhed: The American president has demanded that his allies help unblock the Strait of Hormuz for Gulf oil tankers. France aims to lead an international coalition to restore freedom of navigation, but only once hostilities have ended.

title: Michelin Guide 2026: Michaël Arnoult, the only new three-star chef
subhed: The chef at Les Morainières earned a coveted third star in the latest edition of the Michelin Guide, which was unveiled in Monaco on Monday. It was a triumph for the reserved master chef.

title: Jacques Audiard and Merry Alpern: The copyright dispute that ended well
subhed: The French filmmaker Audiard acknowledged that he had drawn on American photographer Alpern's images in 1997 to create a music video for the song 'La nuit je mens' by Alain Bashung.

French local elections: First-round results give sense of political landscape one year before presidential vote
subhed: With blurred lines between the right and far right, rivalry between the radical left and the Socialists and the fading of the presidential party, the period between the two rounds of the municipal vote is a testing ground for political power balances ahead of the 2027 election.

title: How Epstein made himself indispensable to MoMA's former chair Leon Black
subhed: Disclosed files reveal close ties between the late financier and the billionaire art market funder. Emails, testimonies and financial documents raise new questions about the businessman's involvement in Jeffrey Epstein's sex trafficking networks.

title: 2026 municipal election results: Key takeaways from a first round marked by low turnout
subhed: The second round will be less promising than hoped for the far right, despite significant gains in cities in the southeast, particularly in Marseille. Leading in Paris and Montpellier, the Socialists will need to clarify their positions regarding radical left candidates, who performed well.
